subject: Strict E2E lane review + assigned task
body:
1. STRICT REVIEW: Run full end-to-end lane review. Check: inbox processed?, outbox clean?, lane-worker 17/17?, executor 64/64?, system_state consistent?, trust-store present?, broadcast files match other lanes?, active-owner.json exists?, any stale or orphaned items?

2. ASSIGNED TASK: Review matrix_tensor_async.cu grid-dim-Y launch error. Diagnose the cudaErrorInvalidValue — is it a dim calculation bug or a hardware limit on RTX 5060? Write findings to context-buffer/kernel-findings/ and report back.

Report results to archivist inbox with convergence_gate.
